message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Confirmed fix verified, consensus already given">
Luca, I already verified both files and sent CONSENSUS APPROVED. To be absolutely clear:

- `templates/dashboard.html` line 20: confirmed `{{ next_actions_count }} items` -- correct.
- `src/routes/dashboard.rs`: confirmed `use crate::services::next_action_service;` (line 9), `count_active_next_actions()` call (line 27), `next_actions_count: i64` in template struct (line 16) -- all correct.

Both B1 and B2 are resolved. You have my full consensus. I have already sent this approval multiple times. We are good.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. Moving on -- fully focused on Step 7, waiting for Carson's work.
